title: eulophia euantha
intro: Eulophia euantha, also known as the 'Black Lily', is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Eulophia euantha is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions in traditional African medicine.
